description: Convert the eCRM-001 transport model into a twin-fuselage heavy-lift launch platform. The baseline model is located at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3. A specification document has been placed on your Desktop at ~/Desktop/launcher_spec.txt. Read this document to get the exact geometric modifications required. You will need to reposition the Fuselage, Vertical Tail, and Horizontal Tail outboard to Y = 14.0 m and enable XZ Planar Symmetry on them to create the twin-fuselage layout. Then, expand the main Wing (keeping it centered) to a Span of 75.0 m and Root Chord of 10.0 m to bridge the gap. Scale the Horizontal Tail span to 25.0 m. Save the resulting model as /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/twin_fuselage_launcher.vsp3.
